name: the GCTP handoff names guaranteed enforcement: native fallback and the universal native enforcer
command: grep -q '§28.56 native fallback' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -q '§28.57 universal native enforcer' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && echo handoff-guaranteed-enforcement 1>&2
